name: Bucky Pizzarelli
abstract: John Paul "Bucky" Pizzarelli (January 9, 1926 – April 1, 2020) was an American jazz guitarist. He worked for NBC as a staffman from 1964, including for Dick Cavett (1971) and ABC with Bobby Rosengarden in (1952).

quotes.text: So you know it’s a big kick. And it’s something I didn’t push, but there I am. I did it three weeks ago with Skitch at Carnegie Hall.
quotes.caption: Mentions performing with Skitch at Carnegie Hall
quotes.doc_title: Bucky Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 11, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Javon Jackson
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee does not mention Bucky Pizzarelli; the mention comes solely from the interviewer stating 'I knew Bucky Pizzarelli pretty well'.
about_quotes.doc_title: Javon Jackson interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 3, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jay Leonhart
about_quotes.evidence: with Bucky and John — Bucky Pizzarelli and John Bunch, the group that got called New York Swing, that’s really a remarkable group to be in
about_quotes.doc_title: Jay Leonhart interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 15, 1998 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Jay Leonhart
about_quotes.evidence: with Bucky and John — Bucky Pizzarelli and John Bunch, the group that got called New York Swing, that’s really a remarkable group to be in
about_quotes.doc_title: Jay Leonhart interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 27, 2013 [interview 2 of 2] [transcript only]

about_quotes.speaker: John Beal
about_quotes.evidence: Bucky, Bucky was a great friend of mine from way back and I loved playing with him.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Beal interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 18, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Vaché
about_quotes.evidence: thanks to Bucky Pizzarelli and Kenny Davern... I was cast as Bix for a day... Bucky Pizzarelli recommended me... I did my first overseas trip in 1974 with Benny and John Bunch and Bucky Pizzarelli
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Vaché interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 23, 1995

about_quotes.speaker: Butch Miles
about_quotes.evidence: Dick Hyman... said — me and Milt and Bucky, he said, 'Because you set it up and you guys were the ones who came up with the Basie ideas, I’m giving you co-writing rights on this one'
about_quotes.doc_title: Butch Miles interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 9, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
